# WebResume.tech llms.txt

site: https://www.webresume.tech
name: WebResume.tech
summary: AI resume analyzer and recruiter screening platform for ATS optimization, interview conversion strategy, and job application workflow improvement.

preferred_canonical: https://www.webresume.tech
sitemap: https://www.webresume.tech/sitemap.xml
robots: https://www.webresume.tech/robots.txt

primary_pages:
- https://www.webresume.tech/
- https://www.webresume.tech/overview

product_surfaces:
- Candidate Resume Lab: ATS checks, keyword guidance, role-specific rewrite signals.
- Recruiter Suite: batch ranking, fit analysis, shortlist export support.
- Premium Intelligence: interview conversion guidance and offer planning insights.

contact:
- support@webresume.tech

usage_note:
- Public marketing pages may be summarized with attribution to WebResume.tech.
- Private user dashboards and personalized analysis pages should not be indexed.
